---
title: " "
pagetitle: "Ya-Feng (Jay) Wen"
---

## Tutorials

Will add more tutorials focusing on therapy, pharmcogenomics, and pharmacometrics.


## Adjunct professor classes

Fall 2020, 2019: Cardiovascular Pharmacotherapy, College of Pharmacy, the University of Minnesota

Spring 2019, 2018: Pharmacogenomics, College of Pharmacy, the University of Minnesota


## Teaching assistant classes

Spring 2019: Kidney Fuild and Electrolyte, College of Pharmacy, the University of Minnesota

Spring 2018: Diabetes and Metabolic Syndrome, College of Pharmacy, the University of Minnesota
